text.title: langchain-agents-architectures Decision Tree
text.summary: Pick ReAct vs Plan-and-Execute vs LATS.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the solution path known and linear (deterministic steps)?

branch.conclusion: Skip the agent framework; use a plain LCEL chain or Python function.

branch.question: Does the task require 3+ tool calls with intermediate dependencies?

branch.conclusion: Use ReAct with `create_react_agent`, `max_iterations=15`, and `handle_tool_error=True` on every tool.

branch.question: Is the solution path highly uncertain (multiple plausible approaches; backtracking valuable)?

branch.conclusion: Use LATS with 2 branches × 3 depth, Haiku scoring, Sonnet expansion. Cap LLM calls at 10 per problem.
Use Plan-and-Execute with StateGraph (planner / executor / synthesizer). Add re-plan gate after each executor step.

text.example: q-solution-known → branch(no) → q-multi-step → branch(yes) → q-uncertain-path → branch(no) → conclusion(r3-validate-plan, Plan-and-Execute).
